mapper.update: update coupon_template set full_amount=full_amount-1 where id=#{id} and full_amount > 0
mapper.select: select mc.member_id, mc.template_id, mc.status, mc.verification_code, mc.receive_time, mc.use_time, ct.* from member_coupon mc inner join coupon_template ct on mc.template_id = mc.id where mc.member_id=#{memberId}
